name: Everbridge Critical Event Management API
what_it_does: Everbridge REST API for critical event management and mass notification platform. Enables AI agents to manage mass notification campaign creation and delivery across voice, SMS, email, push, and social channels, handle contact and group management for targeted emergency notifications, access incident creation and lifecycle management for critical event response, retrieve notification delivery status and confirmation tracking for emergency compliance, manage alert template and scenario configuration for rapid response, handle geofencing and location-based notification targeting, access Everbridge IT Alerting for IT incident response orchestration, retrieve audit log and compliance reporting data for regulatory requirements, manage two-way communication and acknowledgment tracking, and integrate emergency notification with ITSM, command center, and business continuity platforms.
use_cases: Sending mass emergency notifications from crisis management agents
Managing IT incident alerts from NOC automation agents
Tracking notification delivery and acknowledgments from compliance agents
Automating safety alerts from physical security agents
not_for: Marketing communications without emergency and safety notification compliance requirements
Consumer messaging without enterprise mass notification scale and compliance
General alerting without critical event management and emergency response context
best_when: An enterprise or government using Everbridge wants AI agents to automate critical event response, mass notification, IT incident alerting, contact targeting, and compliance audit reporting.
avoid_when: LIFE SAFETY RISK: Mass notification automation for life-safety events (evacuations, active threats) must have human authorization in the loop — automated triggering without human approval can cause unnecessary panic or miss time-critical context. Test notifications must be clearly marked to avoid alarm. Do not automate contact list management for life-safety groups without reconciliation validation.

auth.notes: Everbridge uses Basic authentication (username/password) or API key. Per-organization API credentials. Developer portal at developer.everbridge.net. Webhooks for notification delivery and response events. REST API with JSON responses. GIS and geofencing for location-based alerting. FedRAMP authorized for government deployment. SOC2 Type II certified.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-contact subscription; notification volume and product modules determine pricing
pricing.notes: Burlington, Massachusetts. Founded 2002. Public company (EVBG, NASDAQ). Critical event management market. 6,500+ customers including 8 of 10 largest US cities. Mass notification pioneer. Acquired xMatters (2022) for IT alerting. FedRAMP authorized. Strong in government, healthcare, and corporate security. Competes with Rave Mobile Safety for mass notification market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; high-priority emergency notifications have elevated rate allowances

known_agent_gotchas: LIFE SAFETY RISK: Mass emergency notifications require human authorization; never automate life-safety alert triggering without human in the loop; false alarms cause panic and reduce trust
Test vs. production — always mark automated notifications as tests during development; production notification errors reach real emergency contacts
Contact list accuracy — emergency notification accuracy depends on current contact data; automate contact sync from HRIS with reconciliation validation
Delivery confirmation tracking — high-priority alerts require confirmation tracking; implement webhook handlers for delivery and acknowledgment events
FedRAMP deployment — government customers may require FedRAMP authorized deployment; verify environment before production integration
xMatters IT Alerting — Everbridge acquired xMatters (2022); IT Alerting product has separate API surface; verify which product your organization uses
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mass notification and CEM. FedRAMP, SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Emergency contact and notification data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Critical event management. FedRAMP, SOC2, HIPAA. API key. US/EU. Emergency contact and alert data.
